ddls:
CREATE TABLE "passengers" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the passenger */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the passenger (M/F) */,
  "age" REAL /* Age of the passenger */,
  "sibsp" INTEGER /* Number of siblings/spouses aboard */,
  "parch" INTEGER /* Number of parents/children aboard */,
  "ticket" TEXT /* Ticket number */,
  "fare" REAL /* Fare paid for the ticket */,
  "cabin" TEXT /* Cabin number */,
  "embarked" TEXT /* Port of embarkation (C = Cherbourg, Q = Queenstown, S = Southampton) */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Passenger occupation */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Passenger nationality */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Passenger marital status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_embarked FOREIGN KEY ("embarked") REFERENCES ports ("port_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class (e.g., First Class, Second Class) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the class */,
  "accommodation_details" TEXT /* Accommodation details (e.g., number of beds, shared/private bathroom) */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* Amenities provided (e.g., dining, entertainment, recreational facilities) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ports" (
  "port_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each port */,
  "port_name" TEXT /* Name of the port (e.g., Cherbourg, Queenstown, Southampton) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the port */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("port_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tickets" (
  "ticket_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each ticket */,
  "ticket_number" TEXT /* Ticket number */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger who received the ticket */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the travel class */,
  "fare" REAL /* Fare paid for the ticket */,
  "issued_at" TEXT /* Date the ticket was issued */,
  "issued_by" TEXT /* Name or code of the person or entity that issued the ticket */,
  "ticket_type" TEXT /* Type of ticket (e.g., one-way, round-trip) */,
  "ticket_status" TEXT /* Status of the ticket (e.g., purchased, refunded) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., cash, credit card) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cabin_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cabin assignment */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger assigned to the cabin */,
  "cabin_number" TEXT /* Cabin number */,
  "cabin_type" TEXT /* Type of cabin (e.g., Single, Double) */,
  "deck" TEXT /* Deck of the cabin */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cabin_assignments_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lifeboats" (
  "lifeboat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lifeboat */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the lifeboat */,
  "launch_time" TEXT /* Time the lifeboat was launched */,
  "rescue_details" TEXT /* Details of the rescue (e.g., number of survivors, destination) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lifeboat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survival_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survival record */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger */,
  "survived" INTEGER /* Whether the passenger survived (true/false) */,
  "lifeboat" TEXT /* Lifeboat number (if applicable) */,
  "rescue_location" TEXT /* Location of rescue (if applicable) */,
  "cause_of_death" TEXT /* Cause of death (if applicable) */,
  "circumstances" TEXT /* Notable circumstances surrounding survival or death */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survival_records_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "family_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each family relationship */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger */,
  "related_passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related passenger */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., parent, child, spouse) */,
  "degree" TEXT /* Degree of relationship (e.g., first cousin, second cousin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_family_relationships_related_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("related_passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_family_relationships_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passenger_contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact entry */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the passenger */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of residence */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of residence */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of residence */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passenger_contacts_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "embarkation_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each embarkation record */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger */,
  "port_id" TEXT /* ID of the port of embarkation */,
  "embarked_at" TEXT /* Date the passenger embarked */,
  "boarding_time" TEXT /* Time the passenger boarded the ship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_embarkation_records_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_embarkation_records_port_id FOREIGN KEY ("port_id") REFERENCES ports ("port_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crew" (
  "crew_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crew member */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the crew member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the crew member */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the crew member */,
  "experience" TEXT /* Relevant experience of the crew member */,
  "qualifications" TEXT /* Qualifications of the crew member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crew_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger whose data was accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data (e.g., CSV, JSON, Excel) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the data source was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_integrity_checks" (
  "check_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data integrity check */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source being checked */,
  "checked_at" TEXT /* Date the check was performed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the check (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  "report" TEXT /* Report of the check results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("check_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_integrity_checks_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)
